title: Traditional Polish Pork Casserole
description: A hearty and comforting Polish-inspired casserole filled with rich flavors of roasted pork. Perfect for a cozy dinner night.
instructions: In a large skillet, sauté diced carrots and potatoes (if using) until tender.
In a separate skillet, cook Polish sausage until browned, breaking apart with a spoon.
Add caramelized onions, roasted pork, and mushroom gravy to the sausage skillet. Stir to combine.
Transfer the pork mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish. Top with chopped parsley and garlic powder.
In a small bowl, whisk together flour and a splash of water to make a slurry. Pour the slurry into the pork mixture, stirring to combine.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned.
Serve hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
